channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → nan : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Moscow, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / nan. Location: Moscow, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIAN → NIGERIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Kharkiv, Kharkivs'ka Oblast', Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIAN / NIGERIAN. Location: Kharkiv, Kharkivs'ka Oblast', Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [苏丹内战] nan → GOVERNMENT : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Akobo, Wilayat Junqoley, South Sudan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: nan / GOVERNMENT. Location: Akobo, Wilayat Junqoley, South Sudan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [苏丹内战] BRIGADIER GENERAL → SOUTH SUDAN : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Juba, Wilayat Bahr al Jabal, South Sudan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: BRIGADIER GENERAL / SOUTH SUDAN. Location: Juba, Wilayat Bahr al Jabal, South Sudan. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: PRODUCER / DEPUTY. Location: Berea, ?alab, Syria. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.
